title: Nadymons3
description: A cobblemon addon giving a model to my favorite unmodeled pokemons
body:
**Nadymons3** is a cobblemon addon that implements models of pokemon missing in the base mod so you can catch, battle, train and explore the cobblemon world with them.



Currently, the addon only adds two evolution line by now, more pokemon will be integrated into the future. If one of the lines gets integrated to cobblemon i will remove them.

- **Trubbish** : (Spawns in swamp)
- **Garbodor** : (Evolve from Trubbish at level 36)
- **Vanillite** : (Spawn in cold biomes)
- **Vanillish** : (Evolve from Vanillite at level 35)
- **Vanilluxe** : (Evolve from Vanillish at level 47)


## Instalation:
Add This Pack into both Resource Pack folder And Datapack folder.
